name: acesulfame potassium
description: Acesulfame potassium is a high-intensity, calorie-free artificial sweetener used to impart sweetness without adding sugar.
raw_text: my dietor: Dextrose, sweeteners (acesulfame-K, sodium saccharin), stabilizers (microcrystalline cellulose, cross-linked sodium carboxy methyl cellulose), flavouring. | Labels: en:no-gluten, en:no-lactose | Vantaggio: Zucchero; edulcorante: acesulfame K; aromi. | Labels: en:no-gluten | aptonia whey vanille: protéines de lactosérum 97,8% (lait) (isolat et concentrât), épaississant: gomme xanthane, arôme, édulcorants : Acésulfame-K (E950), Sucralose (E955), colorant E160a, émulsifiants: lécithine de tournesol et lécithine de soja. | Labels: en:made-in-france
